function.name: download_audio
function.description: Download audio from a YouTube Music URL. Returns a job ID to track the download progress.

url.description: The YouTube Music URL to download audio from (e.g., https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=abc123)

function.name: convert_audio
function.description: Convert an audio file to a different format. Returns a job ID to track the conversion progress.

input_path.description: Path to the input audio file to convert

function.name: separate_stems
function.description: Separate an audio file into individual stems (vocals, drums, bass, other, guitar, piano) using Demucs AI model. Returns a job ID to track the separation progress.

input_path.description: Path to the input audio file to separate into stems

model.description: Demucs model to use for separation. htdemucs_6s is recommended for best quality and includes guitar/piano stems.

stems.description: List of stems to extract from the audio

shifts.description: Number of random shifts for better separation quality (higher = slower but better)

function.name: analyze_audio
function.description: Analyze an audio file to extract musical features like tempo, key, chord progressions, and song structure. Returns a job ID to track the analysis progress.

input_path.description: Path to the input audio file to analyze (must be WAV format)

analyzers.description: List of analyzers to run on the audio

preset.description: Preset configuration for analysis (overrides individual settings)

transpose_to.description: Transpose chord progressions to target key (e.g., 'C', 'A', 'F#')

config_path.description: Optional path to custom YAML configuration file

function.name: get_job_status
function.description: Get the current status, progress, and result of a job (download, conversion, stem separation, or analysis). Use the job_id returned from other operations.

job_id.description: The unique job identifier to check status for

function.name: query_analysis
function.description: Query and retrieve stored analysis results for a song. Returns detailed analysis data including tempo, key, chords, and structure.

song_id.description: Song identifier or file path to query analysis for

analysis_types.description: Comma-separated list of analysis types to filter (e.g., 'tempo,key,chords')

function.name: list_analyzed_songs
function.description: List all songs that have been analyzed. Returns a list of song IDs.
